title: Issue with "Share My App" Link: Board Creation Works, But Columns Update Fails

posts.author: Usama (Usama)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m experiencing an issue with my monday app when using the “Share My App” link from the Developer Center. Here’s what happens:

  1. I’ve deployed my app successfully on monday.com.
  2. When I test it using the URL provided by the monday code after deployment, everything works fine — the board is created, columns are updated, and records are saved as expected.
  3. However, when I go to the “Share My App” section, copy the link, and test my app using that URL, it partially works:
  • The board is created successfully.
  • But it gets stuck in the middle and doesn’t update the columns or save records.

I’ve checked my app’s logic, API calls, and permissions, and everything seems fine when testing in other environments. I suspect it might be related to how the app initializes or how context is passed when accessed via the shared URL.

Has anyone faced a similar issue or have insights on what might be going wrong?

Thanks in advance for your help!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Usama,

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it so that our team can take a look into it?
